content:

- `IDependencyExtractor` (core/interfaces/dependency.ts): targeted by DependencyExtractor(cpp), DependencyExtractor(golang), DependencyExtractor(java), KotlinDependencyExtractor, DependencyExtractor(python) = 5
- `BaseArchJsonMapper` (plugins/shared/mapper-utils.ts): targeted by ArchJsonMapper(cpp), ArchJsonMapper(golang), ArchJsonMapper(java), ArchJsonMapper(kotlin), ArchJsonMapper(python) = 5

- `PluginError` (core/interfaces/errors.ts): targeted by FileSystemError, ParseError, PluginConfigError, PluginInitializationError, ToolDependencyError = 5
- `IAtlasBuilder` (plugins/golang/atlas/builders/i-atlas-builder.ts): targeted by CapabilityGraphBuilder, FlowGraphBuilder, GoroutineTopologyBuilder, PackageGraphBuilder = 4

2. `IDependencyExtractor`, `BaseArchJsonMapper`, `PluginError` — 5 (tie)

Among the tied group, `IDependencyExtractor`, `BaseArchJsonMapper`, and `PluginError` all have 5. I'll pick the three highest distinct counts.
